days.title: Old Bazaar and City Center
days.summary: A balanced first day focused on history, food, and walkable landmarks.

items.title: Old Bazaar walk
items.description: Explore the market streets and Ottoman-era architecture.

items.title: Local lunch

items.title: Museum visit
items.description: Visit a central museum before an evening walk.
